title: Porter Bundle Manifest
description: Schema for the porter.yaml bundle manifest file used to author Cloud Native Application Bundles (CNAB) with Porter. The manifest defines a bundle's metadata, actions, parameters, credentials, outputs, and the mixin steps to execute for each action.

schemaType.description: Identifies the document type as a Porter bundle manifest.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the Porter bundle schema this manifest conforms to.

name.description: Name of the bundle. Used as the repository name when publishing to an OCI registry.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the bundle installs or manages.

registry.description: OCI registry where the bundle will be published, such as 'ghcr.io/myorg' or 'docker.io/myuser'.

reference.description: Full OCI reference override for the bundle image. If omitted, the reference is constructed from registry, name, and version.

labels.description: Arbitrary key-value labels for the bundle.

annotations.description: OCI annotations to attach to the bundle image.

dockerfile.description: Path to a custom Dockerfile template for building the bundle's invocation image.

mixins.description: List of mixins used in this bundle. Each mixin provides pre-built steps for interacting with tools like Helm, Kubernetes, or Terraform.

parameters.description: Parameter definitions for configuring the bundle at install or upgrade time.

credentials.description: Credential definitions for secrets required by the bundle, such as kubeconfig files or cloud provider tokens.

outputs.description: Output definitions for values produced by the bundle during action execution.

state.description: State definitions for values that are persisted between bundle action runs.

install.description: Steps to execute when running the install action. Each step invokes a mixin or custom action.

upgrade.description: Steps to execute when running the upgrade action.

uninstall.description: Steps to execute when running the uninstall action.

custom.description: Custom actions defined beyond the standard install, upgrade, and uninstall CNAB actions.

images.description: Container images referenced by the bundle for relocation to air-gapped environments.

required.description: Names of extensions required by this bundle.

Maintainer.description: A bundle maintainer with contact information.

url.description: URL for the maintainer's website or profile.

MixinDeclaration.description: Declaration of a mixin used in the bundle, optionally with version and configuration.

oneOf.description: Simple mixin name without version pinning.
Mixin declaration with version and optional configuration.

version.description: Version of the mixin to use.

clientVersion.description: Version of the client tool the mixin wraps.

Parameter.description: A configurable parameter that can be passed to the bundle at execution time.

type.description: JSON Schema type of the parameter.

required.description: Whether a value must be provided for this parameter. Defaults to false.

default.description: Default value used when the parameter is not supplied.

sensitive.description: If true, the parameter value is treated as sensitive and masked in logs.

enum.description: List of allowed values for this parameter.

minLength.description: Minimum string length for string parameters.

maxLength.description: Maximum string length for string parameters.

applyTo.description: List of actions this parameter applies to. If omitted, applies to all actions.

path.description: File path inside the bundle container where the parameter value is written.

env.description: Environment variable name inside the bundle container where the parameter value is set.

Credential.description: A secret or credential required by the bundle for accessing external resources.

description.description: Description of what this credential is used for.

required.description: Whether this credential must be provided. Defaults to true.

path.description: File path inside the bundle container where the credential is written.

env.description: Environment variable name inside the bundle container for the credential.

applyTo.description: List of actions this credential applies to.

Output.description: A value produced and written by the bundle during an action execution.

description.description: Description of what this output represents.

type.description: JSON Schema type of the output value.

sensitive.description: If true, the output value is treated as sensitive and masked in logs.

path.description: File path inside the bundle container where the output value is written by the bundle.

applyTo.description: List of actions that produce this output.

StateVariable.description: A state variable that persists values between bundle action runs.

description.description: Description of the state variable's purpose.

mixin.description: Name of the mixin that manages this state variable.

path.description: File path inside the bundle container where the state is stored.

Dependencies.description: Dependencies on other bundles that must be installed before or alongside this bundle.

Dependency.description: A dependency on another Porter bundle.

name.description: Alias for the dependency, used to reference it in steps.

bundle.description: OCI reference to the dependent bundle.

parameters.description: Parameter mappings to pass from this bundle to the dependency.

credentials.description: Credential mappings to pass from this bundle to the dependency.

Step.description: A single step in a bundle action, invoking a mixin with specific configuration.

additionalProperties.description: Mixin-specific step configuration keyed by mixin name.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this step does.

outputs.description: Outputs to capture from this step's execution.

name.description: Output name as defined in the bundle outputs.

CustomAction.description: A custom action definition beyond the standard CNAB install, upgrade, and uninstall actions.

description.description: Description of what this action does.

modifies.description: If true, the action modifies the installation and its state is tracked.

stateless.description: If true, the action can run without an existing installation.

steps.description: Steps to execute when this action is invoked.

BundleImage.description: A container image referenced by the bundle for air-gapped environment support.

digest.description: OCI digest of the image for content-addressable references.

description.description: Description of the image's purpose within the bundle.

examples.name: hello
examples.description: A very simple bundle that demonstrates Porter's capabilities.
